name: swarm-release-claude
description: Release coordination for AI coding agents, backed by the hosted Swarm Release Manager store. Connects the SRM MCP server so claims, drift, and startability live in one shared store — the same across machines, people, and agents — instead of repo-local JSON.

srm_url.title: SRM store URL
srm_url.description: Base URL of your Swarm Release Manager store, e.g. https://srm.yourco.com. The plugin connects its MCP server at <url>/mcp.

srm_token.title: SRM API token
srm_token.description: Your personal Swarm Release Manager API token. Stored in your system keychain, never in a repo, and sent as the MCP bearer token.
